_meta.scope: native interpreter smoke test + VB1 resolution assessment

test_runner_used: custom bash harness + perl alarm (macOS has no gtimeout). Script: /tmp/hexa_compare.sh. Corpus: /Users/ghost/Dev/hexa-lang/examples/*.hexa (234 files). Per-file timeout 3s.
target_source: roadmap SH-P3-1 done_criteria: '153 tests PASS (기존 Rust 인터프리터와 동일 결과)'

smoke_test_hello_hexa.status: RUNS — but float-precision drift (J2=5.13e-259 vs 0; phi(6)*sigma(6)=2.21e-241 vs 0)

smoke_test_hello_min_hexa.native_vs_rust: BYTE-IDENTICAL (2 lines: 'hello from hexa' + 'walking skeleton green')

sh_p3_1_verdict.explanation: hexa_native binary exists and runs hello.hexa end-to-end (smoke test trivially passes), but the broader '153 tests PASS with Rust parity' criterion is far from met. Only 18 examples produce byte-identical output vs Rust. 84 fail on BOTH sides (likely require unsupported features / runtime deps).

VB1_pre_status: PARTIAL — build_c native DONE, interpreter native 미완 (1546 gcc type errors)
VB1_evidence: hexa_native binary exists and runs, suggesting interpreter.hexa -> C -> gcc path DID complete at some earlier point (2026-04-13). However (1) VB1's own stated blocker was 'interpreter_compile: BLOCKED — 1546 gcc type errors (long<->hexa_arr cast)' which is an RT/COMP task (out of scope); (2) the native interpreter exhibits significant output drift from Rust (only 18/234 byte-identical, 21/234 diff-when-both-run) — this is consistent with remaining type/cast bugs the 1546 errors pointed at; (3) SH-P3-1 done_criteria (153 PASS with Rust parity) NOT met (only 41 native pass, 18 match). Marking VB1 DONE would be fabrication. VB1 needs: tagged-value runtime merge (RT-P3-1/-2) + re-run of smoke suite achieving >=148 MATCH. Leaving VB1 as-is.

suggested_status_updates.SH-P3-1: partial — native interpreter smoke (hello) PASSES, but 153-test parity NOT met (18 byte-identical / 41 native pass / 148 Rust pass out of 234). Either (a) downgrade done_criteria to 'hello.hexa smoke only' and mark done, or (b) keep todo until RT-P3-1/-2 land.
suggested_status_updates.SH-P3-2: blocked — do not declare VB1 DONE until RT-P3-1/-2 land and re-run smoke achieves target pass rate. Leave VB1 at PARTIAL.
